title: AI features and your website
claims_supported: Website owners should make content accessible, useful, and machine-readable for Google Search systems, including AI features.

title: Introducing ChatGPT search
claims_supported: AI assistants can answer with timely web information and source links when search is available.

title: Getting started with schema.org
claims_supported: Structured data helps machines interpret organizations, services, products, offers, and other public entities.

title: Generative Engine Optimization topic coverage
claims_supported: Search marketing teams are treating AI answer visibility, answer engine optimization, and generative engine optimization as an emerging discipline.

title: The next phase of enterprise AI
claims_supported: Enterprise AI is moving toward a unified operating layer with agents grounded in business context, connected to systems, and governed by permissions.

title: Building a new enterprise AI services company with Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, and Goldman Sachs
claims_supported: Mid-sized companies need workflow discovery, custom solution building, and long-term support to put AI into important operations.

title: Secret scanning with GitHub MCP Server is now generally available
claims_supported: MCP-compatible AI coding agents can scan code for exposed secrets before commit or pull request when GitHub Secret Protection is enabled.

title: Scanning for secrets with the GitHub MCP server
claims_supported: GitHub MCP secret scanning is a pre-commit safety check and findings are ephemeral in the agent session.
